description: OOD robustness evaluation: Test q225 (TAM-CTL recovery loss) checkpoint on out-of-distribution matrices. Evaluates both well-conditioned (ood=false) and ill-conditioned (ood=true) test sets.
notes: OOD evaluation on q225 checkpoint (TAM + recovery loss). Evaluates on ood=true (ill-conditioned matrices: rank-1 perturbations, κ >> 1). Baseline for comparison: q220 TAM baseline (val_mse=0.009728). Goal: Quantify robustness improvement from recovery loss training.
